pkgmetadata.longdescription:
GStreamer plugin from gst-plugins-rs (net/ndi) — provides ndisrc, ndisink, ndisinkcombiner, and ndisrcdemux elements plus a device provider for discovering NDI sources via mDNS.
Loads libndi.so at runtime via dlopen; media-libs/libndi wires NDI_RUNTIME_DIR_V6 system-wide so the plugin finds the runtime without per-shell setup.
